pi_items.source: Task instruction specification; matches verifier filter for attribute name matching

DHIS2 official documentation confirms BOOLEAN as valid valueType; corresponds to 'Yes/No' value type mentioned in task instructions; verifier accepts both BOOLEAN and TRUE_ONLY (https://docs.dhis2.org/en/develop/using-the-api/dhis-core-version-master/metadata.html)
Task instruction specification; matches verifier filter for attribute name matching

DHIS2 official documentation confirms INTEGER_POSITIVE as valid valueType; corresponds to 'Positive Integer' mentioned in task instructions; verifier accepts INTEGER, INTEGER_POSITIVE, or NUMBER (https://docs.dhis2.org/en/develop/using-the-api/dhis-core-version-master/metadata.html)

Bo Government Hospital confirmed as real health facility in Bo District, Sierra Leone; it is the only referral hospital in the southern province; included in Sierra Leone's national DHIS2 implementation and demo database (https://sierraleone.unfpa.org/en/news/unfpa-implements-numerous-measures-bo-government-hospital-improve-obstetric-care-services, https://doctor4africa.com/listing/sierra-leone/hospital/bo-government-hospital/, https://databases.dhis2.org/)

Verifier code checks: if str(val1).lower() == 'true' at line 108; DHIS2 stores boolean attribute values as string 'true' or 'false' in API responses; consistent with task instruction to set 'Generator Functional' to 'Yes'
Verifier code checks: if float(val2) == 15.0 at line 121; consistent with task instruction to set 'Distance to District Office (km)' to '15'

privileged_info_summary: The task creates two custom attributes on organisation units in a real DHIS2 system using the Sierra Leone demo database. Attribute 1 'Generator Functional' is of type BOOLEAN (Yes/No), and Attribute 2 'Distance to District Office (km)' is of type INTEGER_POSITIVE. These are assigned to the real health facility 'Bo Government Hospital', a referral hospital in Sierra Leone's health system. Expected values are 'true' (string) for the generator attribute and 15 (numeric) for the distance attribute. All metadata value type claims correspond to valid DHIS2 value types confirmed in official documentation. The facility exists in Sierra Leone's national DHIS2 implementation.
